worktree_state.content:
# Example Theme A minimal, well-documented reference theme for E-Menum developers. > **Purpose:** Use this theme as a starting point when creating custom themes. It demonstrates best practices, required structure, and coding conventions. ## Quick Start 1. Copy this entire folder to create your theme: ```bash cp -r themes/example-theme themes/my-custom-theme ``` 2. Update `theme.json`: - Change `name` to your theme's unique identifier - Update `displayName`, `description`, `version` - Set `enabled: true` when ready to use - Customize colors in the `colors` section 3. Modify the CSS in `styles/main.css`: - Update CSS variables in `:root` - Add your custom styles 4. Customize the EJS templates in `layouts/` and `components/` ## File Structure ``` example-theme/ ├── theme.json # Theme manifest (required) ├── layouts/ │ └── default.ejs # Main layout template (required) ├── components/ │ ├── header.ejs # Header component (required) │ ├── footer.ejs # Footer component (required) │ └── menu-item.ejs # Product card component (required) ├── styles/ │ └── main.css # Main stylesheet (required) └── README.md # Documentation ``` ## Theme Manifest (theme.json) The manifest defines your theme's configuration: ```json { "name": "my-theme", // Unique identifier (kebab-case) "displayName": "My Theme", // Human-readable name "version": "1.0.0", // Semantic version "description": "...", // Brief description "type": "product", // "product" or "admin" "enabled": true, // Enable/disable theme "priority": 100, // Order in theme selector (lower = higher priority) "layouts": { "default": "layouts/default.ejs" }, "components": { "header": "components/header.ejs", "footer": "components/footer.ejs", "menu-item": "components/menu-item.ejs" }, "styles": { "main": "styles/main.css" }, "colors": { "primary": "#6366f1", "primaryLight": "#818cf8", "primaryDark": "#4f46e5" }, "features": { "darkMode": true, "responsive": true } } ``` ## Template Variables These variables are available in all EJS templates: ### Global Variables | Variable | Type | Description | |----------|------|-------------| | `locals.lang` | string | Current language code ('tr', 'en') | | `locals.theme` | string | Theme preference ('light', 'dark') | | `locals.pageTitle` | string | Page title | | `locals.organizationName` | string | Organization name | | `locals.brandColor` | string | Organization's brand color | | `t()` | function | i18n translation function | ### Menu Page Variables | Variable | Type | Description | |----------|------|-------------| | `locals.menu` | object | Menu object {id, name, slug, ...} | | `locals.organization` | object | Organization {name, logo, address, phone, ...} | | `locals.categories` | array | Menu categories with products | | `locals.tableNumber` | string | Table number from QR scan | ### Component Props Components receive props via EJS include: ```ejs <%- include('../components/header', { menu: locals.menu, organization: locals.organization, tableNumber: locals.tableNumber }) %> ``` ## CSS Variables All colors must use CSS variables for dark mode support: ```css :root { /* Brand Colors */ --brand-primary: #6366f1; --brand-primary-light: #818cf8; --brand-primary-dark: #4f46e5; --brand-on-primary: #ffffff; /* Surface Colors */ --surface: #f8fafc; --surface-card: #ffffff; --surface-elevated: #f1f5f9; /* Text Colors */ --text-primary: #0f172a; --text-secondary: #475569; --text-muted: #94a3b8; /* Border Colors */ --border: #e2e8f0; --border-strong: #cbd5e1; } /* Dark mode overrides */ [data-theme="dark"] { --surface: #0f172a; --surface-card: #1e293b; --text-primary: #f8fafc; /* ... */ } ``` ## Important Rules ### DO: - ✅ Use CSS variables for ALL colors - ✅ Use `t()` function for ALL text strings - ✅ Support dark mode via `[data-theme="dark"]` - ✅ Use Phosphor icons (`ph ph-icon-name`) - ✅ Ensure minimum 48x48px touch targets - ✅ Add proper ARIA labels for accessibility - ✅ Use semantic HTML elements - ✅ Test on mobile devices ### DON'T: - ❌ Hardcode colors (e.g., `color: #333`) - ❌ Hardcode text strings (e.g., `

Menu

`) - ❌ Add business logic in templates - ❌ Make API calls from templates - ❌ Access database from templates - ❌ Use inline styles (use classes instead) - ❌ Remove E-Menum branding from footer ## Alpine.js State The layout provides these Alpine.js methods: ```javascript // Available in all components addToCart(product, quantity) // Add item to cart removeFromCart(index) // Remove item from cart formatPrice(price) // Format as currency cartItemCount // Number of items in cart cartTotal // Total cart value cartOpen // Boolean to open/close cart ``` ## Accessibility Requirements 1. **Skip Link**: Include for keyboard navigation 2. **Focus Indicators**: Clear `:focus-visible` styles 3. **Color Contrast**: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum (4.5:1 for text) 4. **Touch Targets**: Minimum 48x48px 5. **Alt Text**: Use empty alt for decorative images 6. **ARIA Labels**: For interactive elements 7. **Semantic HTML**: Use proper heading hierarchy ## Browser Support - Chrome 90+ - Firefox 88+ - Safari 14+ - Edge 90+ - Mobile Safari (iOS 14+) - Chrome for Android ## License Proprietary - E-Menum. All rights reserved.
